allow: Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.$connect\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\(''DB conectada OK''\); return p.usuario.count\(\); }\).then\(n => { console.log\(''Usuarios en BD:'', n\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(''Error:'', e.message\); p.$disconnect\(\); }\);")
